action.reasoning: Observation: This is the first iteration, starting from scratch. Goal is to establish a working pipeline for class-incremental learning on CIFAR-100. Analysis: Need to write model.py, train.py, predict.py, run a very short training (2 epochs per task = 20 total epochs) to validate the pipeline and measure iteration/evaluation time. Decision: Use a simple ResNet-18 adapted for 32x32 images, naive sequential training (no replay yet) with SGD, save checkpoint, test predict.py locally, then submit eval.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 2 --batch_size 256 && cp /data/val.pt ./test.pt && python predict.py --data_path . --checkpoint checkpoints/model.pt --output test_out.json && rm ./test.pt
